title: ASSISTED TRANSPORTATION - 211info
text: SENIOR SERVICES ASSISTED TRANSPORTATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers door-to-door transportation for out-of-town medical appointments. Services are provided by volunteers. 1216 Moore Street Suite #214 Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: Age 60 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Transportation times vary and are based on volunteer availability. (541) 412-8820 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 412-8820 Main phone Main phone (541) 412-8820 Melissa Dovenspike [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Curry County Services: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM TRANSPORTATION - TRANSPORTATION PASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
